Rivian guides 62,000-67,000 vehicle deliveries for 2026, with automotive gross profit positivity expected by year-end.
The results, released on February 12, 2026, highlighted strong growth in software and services amid a decline in automotive revenue, prompting a 21% surge in the company's shares in premarket trading.
Q4 2025 Financial Results
Rivian produced 10,974 vehicles and delivered 9,745 in the fourth quarter at its Normal, Illinois plant, down from prior periods due to production adjustments.
Software and services revenue more than doubled to $447 million, fueled by electrical architecture and software development services from the Volkswagen Group joint venture, as well as growth in remarketing and maintenance.
For the full year, Rivian produced 42,284 vehicles and delivered 42,247, compared to 49,476 produced and 51,579 delivered in 2024.
